ham.subject: Upcoming Maintenance on Moodle – 12 October 2026
ham.body:
Dear Students,

Please be advised that the Moodle Learning Management System will undergo scheduled maintenance on Saturday, 12 October 2026 from 02:00 AM to 05:00 AM UTC. During this window, all course pages, grades, and discussion forums will be temporarily unavailable.

We recommend saving any work before the maintenance window begins and logging back in after 05:00 AM UTC. For a detailed maintenance schedule and impact assessment, visit the university IT portal: <URL>

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
University IT Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Account Verification Required – University IT
spam.body:
Dear Student,

Our security audit has detected unusual activity on the account associated with your university e‑mail address. To prevent any potential compromise and ensure uninterrupted access to your courses, you must verify your identity within the next 24 hours.

Please click the button below to confirm your account details:

[Verify My Account] <URL>

Failure to verify may result in temporary suspension of your university email and access to learning resources.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact the University IT Helpdesk immediately at ithelp@university.edu.

Regards,
University IT Security Team
